name: wonder_theme
description: Uplifting, magical background music for flying and wonder moments. Grand, soaring, awe-inspiring.

sources.title: Take Me With You (15sec) Positive Happy Travel Cinematic Vlog Music
sources.author: AUDIOREZOUT
sources.notes: Cinematic, uplifting, short (~0:18). Good for flight reveal. For longer scenes, loop or use longer tracks.

sources.title: Spring Energy_Medium 1
sources.author: Grand_Project
sources.notes: Upbeat, hopeful, bright. Duration ~1:29. Works well for joyful flying sequences.
